steps.title: Find the zeros in Desmos
steps.content: A factor of the form $x+b$ corresponds to a zero at $x=-b$. Graph $y=2x^3+42x^2+208x$ and look for negative x-intercepts. Desmos shows zeros at $x=0$, $x=-8$, and $x=-13$.

steps.title: Convert roots to factors
steps.content: The negative roots $-8$ and $-13$ correspond to factors $x+8$ and $x+13$. Therefore the possible positive values of $b$ are $8$ and $13$. The smallest possible value is $8$.
